description: The luxe comfort and rugged styling of woodland's shoes are now replicated in its sandals. Wear these with off-duty ensembles for optimal comfort, without compromising on style.UpperCriss crossing leather straps across the midfoot and forefootRivet embellishments on the upper for styleCushioned footbed with plush leather OutsoleDurable rubber outsole with multi-directional textured lugs for absolute grip and traction on various surfacesSandal careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
